prompt: A cinematic vertical poster inspired by The Little Prince, set on a rainy city street at blue hour in modern Shanghai. In the center foreground, a small child in Little Prince styling stands in side profile facing right, with messy curly golden-blond hair, a long flowing mustard-gold scarf blowing dramatically to the left, and a muted sage-green ankle-length coat tied at the waist. The child holds 1 single red rose upright in both hands. The face is simplified and softly obscured, with no detailed facial features. The wet pavement reflects neon lights, traffic, and the evening sky. In the background, the Oriental Pearl Tower rises softly out of the dusk with glowing pinkish lights, surrounded by blurred city buildings, storefronts, pedestrians, and car headlights, creating a dreamy bokeh urban atmosphere. On the upper right, include 1 street sign mounted on a traffic pole reading 星球大道\nPLANET AVE.. Also on the pole, include 1 red pedestrian traffic light showing a standing human figure. On the left side, place large handwritten brush-style Chinese quote text in warm pale yellow: 重要的东西，\n用眼睛是看不见的。, with a smaller signature line beneath reading —— 小王子. Scatter a few tiny hand-drawn star doodles and 1 small planet doodle around the text. Near the lower left, add 3 lines of small warm-yellow Chinese dedication text above a stylized script title reading Le Petit Prince. On the right side near the pole, tape 1 small paper note with handwritten Chinese text about not seeing truly important things with the eyes, plus a simple doodle. Add 1 vertical storefront sign on the left reading "咖啡". The composition should feel poetic, nostalgic, gentle, and premium, like an art-house movie poster or literary inspirational street poster. Color palette: twilight blue sky, amber street glow, soft gold typography, muted green clothing, vivid red rose. Shallow depth of field, glossy rain reflections, soft cinematic lighting, highly detailed illustration with realistic urban atmosphere and storybook character design.
